## Appeal Points
- Comprehensive implementation of authentication, user profiles, notifications, and timeline/feed.
- Modular architecture with clear separation between controllers, services, and DTOs.
- Enhanced UI/UX with notifications, user search, language context, and a modern navigation experience.
- Test cases included for core modules, facilitating future maintenance.

## Implemented Features
- Authentication (login, registration, JWT)  
  _Commit: 4722c09e_
- Navigation bar with language context and protected routes  
  _Commit: 854c02aa_
- Timeline/feed to display murmurs  
  _Commit: 535a608d_
- User profile view and edit functionality  
  _Commit: a9faf1c9_
- Discover page for users and trending murmurs  
  _Commit: d780771c_
- MurmurDetails component for individual murmurs  
  _Commits: 4f900254, 5dfee210_
- User-only search functionality  
  _Commit: ccfc962b0_
- Notifications module (scaffold + follower/language update notifications)  
  _Commits: c324c251, d8cf694c_
- API configurations and entities  
  _Commits: 43ee8e3c, e0332369, 8e83a155_
- Test cases and app structure updates  
  _Commits: 6c4804b1, c0911e50_

## Unimplemented Features / Future Enhancements
- Advanced notification types (e.g., comment replies, system alerts)
- Full multi-language support beyond current scaffold
- Comprehensive unit/integration test coverage for all modules
- Media attachments (images, videos) for murmurs
- Live chat or real-time messaging functionality
- Video sharing and streaming features
- Audio recording and playback support
- Group chat and community features
- Push notifications for mobile and web

## Impressions
- The project was challenging but rewarding, resulting in a scalable and modular codebase.
- Iterative development and refactoring improved code quality and maintainability.
- Implementing real-time features and UI enhancements provided valuable learning experiences.
